testimonials.title: Customer Feedback
testimonials.subtitle: What our clients say about their experience

reviews.text: Thank you for the beautiful handmade outfits. Wearing something made with so much love made the celebration feel truly special. Every detail, from the colors to the soft fabrics and perfect cuts, was stunning. I did not just wear clothes. I wore a piece of your heart. Thank you for making me feel beautiful.
reviews.author: Elena

reviews.text: Nupur aunty is not just a designer. She is someone you can completely trust. I have gone to her with very vague ideas and she always turned them into exactly what I wanted. She designed all my wedding outfits and I could not have trusted anyone else. Her attention to detail, patience and creativity shine in every outfit.
reviews.author: Aesha

reviews.text: The team at Being Women transformed my everyday wear with expert tailoring. Every piece fits like it was made for me - because it was!
reviews.author: Roshni Mehta

reviews.text: Beautiful stitching and a perfect fit. The blouse detailing was stunning and felt so premium.
reviews.author: Anaya Desai

about.title: The Story of Being Women
about.subtitle: Celebrating the rich heritage of Indian fashion while embracing modern elegance

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: At Being Women, we are dedicated to bringing you authentic, stylish, and high-quality ethnic wear. Our mission is to preserve and celebrate the rich traditions of Indian fashion while making it accessible to the modern woman.

items.title: Authenticity
items.description: Every piece in our collection reflects the true essence of Indian craftsmanship and cultural heritage.

items.title: Quality
items.description: We source the finest fabrics and work with skilled artisans to create garments that last.

items.title: Tradition Meets Modern
items.description: Our designs honor traditional techniques while embracing contemporary styles for today's woman.

founder.title: A Message from Our Founder
founder.message: Indian ethnic wear is more than just clothing. It is a celebration of our rich cultural heritage. At Being Women, we are dedicated to bringing you authentic designs that make you feel confident and beautiful, whether at a wedding, during a festival, at work, or even at home. After all, to be a woman is to be beautiful.
founder.name: Nupur Soni

commitment.title: Our Commitment
commitment.description: Being Women is committed to ensuring digital accessibility for people with disabilities. We are continually improving the user experience for everyone and applying the relevant accessibility standards.

features.title: Accessibility Features
list: Semantic HTML for better screen reader compatibility
ARIA landmarks and labels where appropriate
Alt text for all meaningful images
Resizable text without loss of functionality

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about our products, shipping, returns, and more

questions.a: For domestic orders within India, standard shipping takes 5-7 business days. Express shipping is available for 2-3 business days. International shipping typically takes 7-14 business days, depending on the destination.

questions.q: How do I find my perfect size?
questions.a: Use our detailed size guide with measurements for all garments. For lehengas, measure your bust, waist, and hip. For kurtis, take shoulder, bust, and length measurements. When in doubt, call us or visit our boutique, and we will guide you.

stillHaveQuestions.title: Still Have Questions?
stillHaveQuestions.description: Can't find the answer you're looking for? Please chat to our friendly team.

usage.title: How We Use Your Information
usage.description: We use your information to process orders, communicate about your orders, and improve our services. Your data will not be shared with any Third Party for marketing or other purposes.

hero.title: Custom Wedding Outfits Tailored for You
hero.subtitle: Celebrate your big day in style with intricately crafted bridal wear, tailored to reflect your story and personal style. From engagement to reception, get beautifully tailored outfits for each of your wedding functions.

bridal.title: Made-to-measure Bridal Outfits
bridal.description: Turn your wedding vision into reality with our personalized bridal lehenga stitching, made to fit you perfectly on your special days. Designed and created to celebrate your story and style through picture-perfect elegant outfits.

The Perfect Pairings.title: Designer Blouses & Styled Dupattas
The Perfect Pairings.description: Transform your bridal look with contemporary blouse and dupatta designs that blend tradition and trend. From custom blouses featuring intricate embroidery, sleeveless and designer necklines to dupattas adorned with lace, tassels, and ornate borders every detail is handcrafted to beautifully complement your saree or lehenga.

sarees.title: Handcrafted Bridal Sarees
sarees.description: Embrace tradition with our custom-crafted GharChola, Bandhani, and Patola sarees. Each piece features exquisite zari work and gota-patti finishes, creating the perfect traditional wedding attire. Our team pays special attention to incorporating authentic Gujarati elements while ensuring modern style.

family.title: Coordinated Family Wedding Wear
family.description: Make every moment memorable with coordinated outfits for the bride’s family. Our designers create harmonious looks that complement the bridal attire while maintaining individual elegance. Each piece is tailored to perfection, ensuring everyone shines on the special day.

cta.title: Create Your Dream Wedding Outfit
cta.subtitle: Let our expert tailors bring your vision to life. Book a consultation today and experience the excellence of traditional Gujarati craftsmanship.

hero.title: Navratri Styles
hero.subtitle: Celebrate Garba Nights with perfectly tailored traditional Gujarati attire

chaniyaCholi.title: Chaniya Choli for Garba Nights
chaniyaCholi.description: Celebrate the spirit of Navratri with our personalized Chaniya Cholis. We design your outfits for all nine nights, tailored to fit you perfectly and stay comfortable for dancing away all night. Our expert tailors create flairs that complement your style and dancing grace.

garbaWear.title: Garba Crop Tops & Blouses
garbaWear.description: Dance the night away in our specially designed Garba tops and blouses. Each piece is crafted with breathable fabrics and secure stitching, allowing free movement while maintaining style. We incorporate traditional elements with modern comfort for the perfect festive wear.

fusion.title: Modern Fusion Styles & Accessories
fusion.description: Embrace modern festive fashion with our fusion Kediyu, Dhoti and Indo-Western styles. We combine traditional Gujarati elements with contemporary designs, creating unique outfits perfect for special Garba nights. From elaborately designed dupattas to matching potli bags and decorative latkans, we create coordinated pieces that perfectly complement your festive attire.

cta.title: Get Ready for Navratri
cta.subtitle: Let our expert tailors create your perfect festive attire. Book a consultation today to avoid last-minute rush and experience the joy of custom-fitted traditional wear.

hero.title: Casual and Workwear
hero.subtitle: Experience the comfort of perfectly fitted everyday wear with our expert tailoring services

kurtis.title: Kurtis, Tops & Tunics
kurtis.description: Experience the perfect blend of comfort and style with our custom-tailored kurtis and tunics. We specialize in creating unique pieces using traditional Gujarati fabrics like bandhej, ajrakh, and ikkat. Each garment is crafted to ensure both comfort and elegance for your everyday wear.

salwar.title: Dress Sets
salwar.description: Discover comfort and elegance with our custom-tailored Dress-Dupatta-Bottoms sets. We create outfits with fabrics selected by you, with trendy necklines, comfortable Pallazos, and various sleeve options. Each piece is designed to provide both style and comfort for your daily wear.

blouses.title: Workwear
blouses.description: Look professional and feel confident with our custom-tailored workwear saree blouses, Indo-western sets, Kurtis, loose-fitting bottomwear and more. We create elegant, breathable designs perfect for office wear and semi-formal occasions. Each piece is crafted to ensure comfort during long working hours while maintaining a sharp, professional appearance.

alterations.title: Alteration Services
alterations.description: Give your existing outfits a fresh look with our professional alteration services. Whether you need to resize, refit, or redesign your garments, our experienced tailors ensure each piece is modified to perfection while maintaining its original charm.

cta.title: Elevate Your Daily Style
cta.subtitle: Let our expert tailors create your perfect everyday wear. Book a consultation today and experience the comfort of custom-fitted fashion.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Ready to experience the perfect fit? Book a consultation with our expert tailors today.

visit.title: Visit Us
visit.desc: Walk into our boutique for consultation and measurements.

design.title: Design Finalization
design.desc: We help you choose fabric, style, and embroidery details.

tailor.title: Tailoring Begins
tailor.desc: Our skilled artisans begin stitching your custom outfit.

fitting.title: Fittings & Adjustments
fitting.desc: Try on your outfit and we’ll perfect the fit.

pickup.title: Pickup / Delivery
pickup.desc: Collect your order or request delivery if available.

delivery.title: Pickup & Delivery
delivery.pickup: In-store pickup is available once your outfit is ready.
delivery.delivery: Home delivery can be arranged within select areas on request.
delivery.international: International shipping is available post-consultation and pre-payment.

notes.title: Additional Notes
notes.rush: Rush orders may be accepted with additional fees, subject to availability.
notes.updates: Order updates are sent via WhatsApp or SMS.
notes.quality: All outfits are tailored in-house with top quality craftsmanship.
